excerpt: The official programme page for MA in Guidance and Counselling lists Early round opening on 2026-07-02 and closing on 2026-10-20. Source: https://www.polyu.edu.hk/study/pg/tpg/2027/54047-gcf-gcp Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round) Non-Local Application Deadline: 20 Oct 2026 (Early Round)
matchedTextBefore: ​Applications are considered on a rolling basis. Shortlisted candidates may be invited to attend an interview. Qualified candidates will be notified of their results via the eAdmission. Once all vacancies are filled, the remaining qualified applicants will be put on a waiting list. Early applications are strongly encouraged.
